title: Pentatherum balansae
intro: Pentaphragmella (not Pentatherum) balansae, also known as Pentaphragmella balansae is a plant species of the genus Pentaphragmella. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, which include reducing inflammation, acting as an antioxidant, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Pentaphragmella balansae include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and infections.
